description: Canonical component vocabulary for rocket_surgeon. Defines all hookable component names that model adapters map HuggingFace module paths to. Every adapter MUST map to names from this vocabulary. Unknown modules that do not appear in an adapter mapping are assigned the fallback name _raw.<original.module.path>.
fallback_description: Any HuggingFace module path not covered by an adapter mapping is exposed under the _raw prefix. The original dotted module path is preserved verbatim after the prefix. Example: an unmapped module 'model.layers.0.self_attn.rotary_emb' becomes '_raw.model.layers.0.self_attn.rotary_emb'. Clients MUST treat _raw components as opaque — no assumptions about tensor shape or semantics.

dense_components.name: embed_tokens
dense_components.description: Token embedding layer. Maps input token IDs to dense vectors.

dense_components.name: layers[i].ln1
dense_components.description: Pre-attention layer norm (RMSNorm for Llama family, LayerNorm for GPT-NeoX).

dense_components.name: layers[i].attn
dense_components.description: Attention module (composite). Contains q/k/v/o projections. Hook captures the full attention output.

dense_components.name: layers[i].attn.q_proj
dense_components.description: Query projection. Maps hidden states to query vectors.

dense_components.name: layers[i].attn.k_proj
dense_components.description: Key projection. Maps hidden states to key vectors.

dense_components.name: layers[i].attn.v_proj
dense_components.description: Value projection. Maps hidden states to value vectors.

dense_components.name: layers[i].attn.o_proj
dense_components.description: Output projection. Maps concatenated head outputs back to hidden dimension.

dense_components.name: layers[i].attn.scores
dense_components.description: Attention scores (virtual probe). Captured from the attention computation, not a hookable nn.Module. Requires eager SDPA or LSE reconstruction for FlashAttention.

dense_components.name: layers[i].mlp
dense_components.description: MLP module (composite). Contains gate/up/down projections for SwiGLU or equivalent.

dense_components.name: layers[i].mlp.gate_proj
dense_components.description: Gate projection (SwiGLU gate). Projects hidden states to intermediate dimension.

dense_components.name: layers[i].mlp.up_proj
dense_components.description: Up projection. Projects hidden states to intermediate dimension (paired with gate in SwiGLU).

dense_components.name: layers[i].mlp.down_proj
dense_components.description: Down projection. Projects intermediate activations back to hidden dimension.

dense_components.name: layers[i].residual_pre
dense_components.description: Residual stream entering the transformer block (before attention). Virtual probe — captured at block entry, not a distinct module.

dense_components.name: layers[i].residual_mid
dense_components.description: Residual stream between attention and MLP (after attention add, before MLP). Virtual probe.

dense_components.name: layers[i].residual_post
dense_components.description: Residual stream leaving the transformer block (after MLP add). Virtual probe.

dense_components.name: ln_final
dense_components.description: Final layer norm applied to the last transformer block's output.

dense_components.name: lm_head
dense_components.description: Language model head. Projects hidden states to vocabulary logits.

moe_components.name: layers[i].router
moe_components.description: MoE gating network. Computes routing scores for dispatching tokens to experts.

moe_components.name: layers[i].router.logits
moe_components.description: Raw router logits (pre-softmax, pre-top-k). Virtual probe — captured from the router's linear output before gating.

moe_components.name: layers[i].router.decision
moe_components.description: Top-k selection result. Virtual probe — captures the post-softmax, post-top-k expert assignments and weights per token.

moe_components.name: layers[i].experts[j]
moe_components.description: Expert j (composite). An individual expert MLP within the MoE layer. Hook captures the full expert output.

moe_components.name: layers[i].experts[j].gate_proj
moe_components.description: Expert gate projection. Same role as dense mlp.gate_proj but within one expert.

moe_components.name: layers[i].experts[j].up_proj
moe_components.description: Expert up projection. Same role as dense mlp.up_proj but within one expert.

moe_components.name: layers[i].experts[j].down_proj
moe_components.description: Expert down projection. Same role as dense mlp.down_proj but within one expert.

moe_components.name: layers[i].shared_expert
moe_components.description: Shared expert (DeepSeek-V3 style). Always-active expert whose output is added to the routed expert outputs. Not present in all MoE architectures.
